name: Prometheus Creative Mode
description: HyperFrames-first Prometheus Creative Mode front door plus Creative Generative Pipeline for AI image/video shots, continuity, layers, rough cuts, overlays, captions, voiceover, audio, QA, and export.

resources.description: Consolidation map from older creative skills into this unified bundle.
Canonical Prometheus HTML Motion engineering spec for valid clips, timing units, runtime clock, lint/inspect, QA, audio, renderer identity, and standalone compatibility export.

Current Prometheus Creative Generative Pipeline tool map for projects, storyboards, image/video shots, continuity, layer extraction, rough cuts, overlays, captions, voiceover, audio, music, SFX, compositing, and QA.
Known issue and recovery pattern for Creative stitch/rough-cut outputs truncating multi-clip generated sequences; observed during Prometheus/PulseFit promo on 2026-05-20.
